artifacts.consumer_use: Exercise importer parsing and record-id matching.

artifacts.role: Response-log rows after applying example intake.
artifacts.consumer_use: Inspect typed applied rows without changing canonical response status.
Feed fixture counts into UI/API tests without recomputing rows.
Scan importer behavior without opening JSON.

artifacts.role: Task routing for the applied fixture set.
artifacts.consumer_use: Choose the right applied artifact by implementation task.
Confirm roles and guardrails for applied importer artifacts.
Inspect row-level changes after applying example intake.
Feed delta rows into UI/API diff consumers.
Confirm field meanings and blocked-claim guardrails.

boundary: Importer fixture only; not canonical response status, public-claim eligibility, misconduct finding, performance finding, or proof of reform benefits.
use_rule: Track response status and remaining evidence gaps; do not claim TAXLANE found fraud, waste, abuse, legal dedication of income taxes, poor performance, or proven reform benefits.
